workflow: Generate single VFX assets in ChatGPT, then remove background or use additive/screen blending in post-process.
goal: Distinct and gameplay-readable attack effect prompts for towers and enemies in a cyberpunk tower defense game.
render_note: Use a pure black background for clearer glow separation, easier post-processing, and additive-friendly VFX extraction.
retry_note: If the result includes a tower, monster, weapon, or scenery, retry with this sentence appended: remove all units and scenery, keep only one isolated VFX element on a pure black background, make the effect shape cleaner and more readable.
effect_style_guide: cyberpunk tower defense VFX asset, premium mobile game special effect illustration, effect-only image, single VFX element, centered composition, full effect visible, enough empty margin, pure black background, high contrast glow, readable silhouette, no tower, no monster, no weapon source, no environment, no floor, no smoke clouds, no debris chunks, no text, no logo, no watermark
